subject: [DMAAP] Fix scaling logic for message router kafka and zookeeper
commit_message:
[DMAAP] Fix scaling logic for message router kafka and zookeeper

Currently if we want to scale message router kafka and zookeeper
we need to do manual changes in charts to make it work. With this patch
all can be done with override files.

Issue-ID: OOM-2613
Signed-off-by: Marat Salakhutdinov <marat.salakhutdinov@bell.ca>
Change-Id: I1782dca26f964f33c250520ee2e187619cee0e5e

Fiachra, I almost sure you’re OK but just be 100%, can you confirm :) ?

Patch Set 8:

> Patch Set 8: Code-Review+2
> 
> Fiachra, I almost sure you’re OK but just be 100%, can you confirm :) ?

Should the default value not be removed from the zookeeper charts also?
Also, what the diff between global.Values and root.Values?

Patch Set 8:

> Patch Set 8:
> 
> > Patch Set 8: Code-Review+2
> > 
> > Fiachra, I almost sure you’re OK but just be 100%, can you confirm :) ?
> 
> Should the default value not be removed from the zookeeper charts also?
> Also, what the diff between global.Values and root.Values?

Will remove that default value, thanks.
In this case there is no difference between global and root as in both cases . was assigned to those variables, just seems someone prefer one name than another. Another very popular variable name use for that is dot.
